caption: In an indoor setting that appears to be a legislative assembly, several individuals are seated in rows of green cushioned seats. The central figure is a man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a crisp white button-down shirt. In the initial moments, he holds his hands together in a prayer-like gesture, often used as a greeting or sign of respect. He looks toward someone off-camera with a neutral expression. As the scene progresses, he lowers his hands and begins to speak, his facial expression shifting as he opens his mouth. Other people are partially visible in the background, including a person in a white shirt behind him and someone wearing a red garment to the left. Small white numbered labels, such as "090" and "290", are visible on the furniture in front of the seating area.
